description: The reviewer's adversarial verdict. pass is true ONLY when blockers is empty and the work is production-ready. Every blocker carries file:line evidence.

pass.description: true ONLY with zero blockers and production-ready work.

blockers.description: CRITICAL/HIGH findings. MUST be empty for pass=true.

evidence.description: file:line the blocker is grounded in

not_covered.description: Paths/claims NOT reviewed; empty is fine, omitted is a defect.
